title.en: WIND MOTORS

definition.ko: 1. 이 서브클래스는 풍력 모터, 즉. 풍력 에너지를 유용한 기계적 동력으로 변환하고 이러한 동력을 사용 지점으로 전송하는 메커니즘을 포함한다. 2. 이 서브클래스는 풍력 발전소의 전기 발전 또는 분배 측면을 포함하지 않으며, 이는 섹션 H에서 다룬다, 예. H02J 또는 H02P. 3. 이 서브클래스에서 다음 용어 또는 표현은 지시된 의미로 사용된다. ㆍ"로터"는 풍력 모터의 바람과 맞닿는 부분과 이를 운반하는 회전 멤버를 의미한다. ㆍ"회전 축"은 로터의 회전 축을 의미한다.

title.ko: 거의 풍력방향으로 회전축을 갖는 풍력원동기 (제어 F03D 7/02)
title.en: Wind motors with rotation axis substantially parallel to the air flow entering the rotor (controlling thereof F03D0007020000)
having a plurality of rotors

title.ko: 고정적 풍력전도수단을 갖는 것, 예. 측판 또는 홈을 갖는 것 (F03D 9/35 우선 )
title.en: having stationary wind-guiding means, e.g. with shrouds or channels (F03D0009350000 takes precedence)
Rotors

title.ko: 풍력의 방향에 거의 직각인 회전축을 가진 풍력원동기 (제어 F03D 7/00)
title.en: Wind motors with rotation axis substantially perpendicular to the air flow entering the rotor (controlling thereof F03D0007060000)
having a plurality of rotors

title.ko: 고정적 풍력전도수단을 갖는 것, 예. 측판 또는 홈을 갖는 것 (F03D 9/35 우선 )
title.en: having stationary wind-guiding means, e.g. with shrouds or channels (F03D0009350000 takes precedence)
Rotors
Other wind motors (controlling thereof F03D0007000000)
the wind-engaging parts being attached to endless chains or the like
the wind-engaging parts being attached to carriages running on tracks or the like
the wind-engaging parts swinging to-and-fro and not rotating

title.ko: 풍력원동기의 제어(전력급전 또는 전력배전기 공급 또는 분배 H02J, 예. 회로망내의 무효전력을 조정, 제거, 보상하기 위한 장치 H02J 3/18; 발전기의 제어 H02P, 예. 목표 출력을 얻기 위한 발전기 제어장치 H02P 9/00)
title.en: Controlling wind motors (supplying or distributing electrical power H02J, e.g. arrangements for adjusting, eliminating or compensating reactive power in networks H02J0003180000;controlling electric generators H02P, e.g. arrangements for controlling electric generators for the purpose of obtaining a desired output H02P0009000000)
the wind motors having rotation axis substantially parallel to the air flow entering the rotor
Automatic control; Regulation
the wind motors having rotation axis substantially perpendicular to the air flow entering the rotor

title.ko: 풍력 원동기의 특수 용도로의 적응; 풍력 원동기와 그것에 의해 구동되는 장치와 조합; 특정 위치에 설치하기 위해 특별히 적용되는 풍력 원동기 (전력 발생을 위한 하이브리드 풍력-태양 에너지 시스템 H02S 10/12 )
title.en: Adaptations of wind motors for special use; Combinations of wind motors with apparatus driven thereby; Wind motors specially adapted for installation in particular locations (hybrid wind-photovoltaic energy systems for the generation of electric power H02S0010120000)
Combinations of wind motors with apparatus storing energy
storing electrical energy
storing kinetic energy, e.g. using flywheels
storing gravitational potential energy
using liquids
using weights
storing energy in pressurised fluids
storing heat
storing chemical energy, e.g. using electrolysis

title.ko: 구동되는 장치에 의해서 특징지워지는 풍력 원동기 (F03D 9/10 우선 )
title.en: Wind motors characterised by the driven apparatus (F03D0009100000 takes precedence)
the apparatus producing heat
the apparatus being an electrical generator (F03D0009220000 takes precedence)
the apparatus being a pump or a compressor

title.ko: 특정 위치에 설치하기 위해 특별히 적용되는 풍력 원동기 (풍력원동기를 장착 또는 지지하기 위한 수단 F03D 13/20 )
title.en: Wind motors specially adapted for installation in particular locations (means for mounting or supporting wind motors F03D0013200000)
on moving objects, e.g. vehicles
on stationary objects or on stationary man-made structures
within towers, e.g. using chimney effects
with means for enhancing the air flow within the tower, e.g. by heating
by circulation or vortex formation
by using the wind outside the tower, e.g. using ejectors
using infrastructure primarily used for other purposes, e.g. masts for overhead railway power lines
Building formations
Tunnels or streets
using landscape topography, e.g. valleys
Assembly, mounting or commissioning of wind motors; Arrangements specially adapted for transporting wind motor components
Assembly of wind motors; Arrangements for erecting wind motors
Arrangements for mounting or supporting wind motors; Masts or towers for wind motors
specially adapted for offshore installation
Commissioning, e.g. inspection, testing or final adjustment before releasing for production
Balancing static or dynamic imbalances
Arrangements or methods specially adapted for transporting wind motor components
Transmission of mechanical power
using gearing not limited to rotary motion, e.g. with oscillating or reciprocating members
Gearless transmission, i.e. direct-drive

title.ko: 풍력 원동기의 가시 또는 시험, 예. 진단 (풍력 원동기의 시운전 동안의 시험 F03D 13/30 )
title.en: Monitoring or testing of wind motors, e.g. diagnostics (testing during commissioning of wind motors F03D0013300000)

title.ko: 그룹 F03D 1/00-F03D17/00으로 분류되지 않는 세부, 요소 또는 부속물
title.en: Details, components or accessories not provided for in groups F03D0001000000-F03D0017000000
Arrangements for warning air traffic
Arrangements for avoiding shadow flicker
Lightning protection
Ice detection; De-icing means
Maintenance or repair
Cleaning (F03D0080400000 takes precedence)
Cooling or heating of wind motors
Bearing or lubricating arrangements
Arrangement of components within nacelles or towers
